title: Editor Messages
text: Editor Messages Define or edit Uniface text editor messages for the current language setup. You can: Modify the message text. Cause the message to appear as an askmess message. Make the terminal beep when the message is displayed. Disable a message. Fields Number Message Askmess Beep Disable How to Working with Language Setups Related Links Language Setups A language setup is a collection of definitions that specify the texts and formatting of language-related data that may be visible in the user interface of a desktop application.
